# Jahanzaib Shaikh

Canonical website: https://jahanzaibshaikh.dev

Jahanzaib Shaikh is a full stack engineer and AI automation developer from Sukkur, Pakistan.

Core work:
- SaaS platforms
- Web applications
- Dashboards
- Mobile apps
- Backend systems
- API integrations
- AI automation workflows
- Premium UI/UX product interfaces

Core stack:
- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- Supabase
- Firebase
- Flutter
- Dart
- Tailwind CSS
